### Verified Facts
- App could be built and started after fixing a malformed `src/app/api/checkout/route.ts`.
- Homepage/cart/compare advanced-tab flows were manually verified via Playwright script during this attempt.
- `src/services/api-client.ts`, `src/app/api/products/route.ts`, and `src/app/page.tsx` were inspected as likely performance-related paths.
- `test_external_api_actually_called` is currently failing.
- The previous attempt focused mostly on UI/render changes and cleanup, not on guaranteeing that the products flow performs a real external API call.

### Current Error Pattern
The performance suite expects an actual upstream/external API request to occur, but the current implementation appears to serve product data from local/static/in-memory logic or otherwise bypass the external client path, so the test does not observe a real external call.

### Next Strategy
Inspect and fix the product data flow end-to-end: trace `page.tsx` â `api/products` â `services/api-client.ts`, identify where external fetching is skipped, and change only that path so it always uses the external API client in the code path the test exercises. Add a minimal local verification by instrumenting/logging or mocking the external call boundary rather than more UI changes.
